shield_standard.name: Standard Shield Gen
shield_standard.desc: Factory default shield array. Functional but weak.

shield_carbon.name: Carbon Deflector Gen
shield_carbon.desc: Reinforced carbon mesh weave. Adds +30 Maximum Shields.

shield_aegis.name: Aegis Matrix Gen
shield_aegis.desc: High-yield polarizing array. Adds +60 Maximum Shields.

shield_void.name: Void-Shield Harmonizer
shield_void.desc: Experimental dark energy barrier. Adds +100 Maximum Shields.

hull_reinforced.name: Blast Alloy Plates
hull_reinforced.desc: Explosive-resistant composite weave. Adds +40 Maximum Hull Integrity.

hull_nanite.name: Nanite Self-Sealing Plates
hull_nanite.desc: Micro-repair layers that fuse under fire. Adds +80 Maximum Hull Integrity.

hull_neutron.name: Neutron Core Matrix Armor
hull_neutron.desc: Sub-atomic compressed plate lattice. Adds +150 Maximum Hull Integrity.

engine_ion.name: Ion Thruster Drive
engine_ion.desc: Highly balanced propulsion matrix. Cuts fuel consumption by 15%.

engine_fusion.name: Thermonuclear Core Drive
engine_fusion.desc: Heavy fuel recycling conduits. Cuts fuel consumption by 30%.

engine_singularity.name: Singularity Fold Drive
engine_singularity.desc: Manipulates space-fold directly. Cuts fuel consumption by 50%.

scanner_standard.name: Standard Scanners
scanner_standard.desc: Factory default radar. Basic threat scanning.

scanner_mk1.name: Scan Suite MK1
scanner_mk1.desc: Tuned emission antenna. Resolves spectral lines with 30% active noise reduction.

scanner_mk2.name: Scan Suite MK2
scanner_mk2.desc: Active thermal/IR filter set. Resolves spectral lines with 50% noise reduction.

scanner_mk3.name: Scan Suite MK3
scanner_mk3.desc: Quantum-stabilized Gamma/X-Ray array. Resolves spectral lines with 75% noise reduction.

scanner_mk4.name: Scan Suite MK4
scanner_mk4.desc: Void-Spectral Supercomputer analyzer. Resolves spectral lines with 90% noise reduction.

scanner_tachyon.name: Tachyon Radiometer
scanner_tachyon.desc: Deep sensor pulses. Increases planetary scanning success chance by 15%.

scanner_quantum.name: Quantum Entangled Radar
scanner_quantum.desc: Zero-latency telemetry sweep. Increases planetary scanning success chance by 30%.

cargo_compression.name: Magnetic Compression Cells
cargo_compression.desc: Advanced physical space compaction. Adds +4 cargo slots.

cargo_dimensional.name: Sub-Space Compartments
cargo_dimensional.desc: Warp folder boxes within boxes. Adds +8 cargo slots.

cargo_pocket_void.name: Pocket Void Expanders
cargo_pocket_void.desc: Folds extra-dimensional bubbles directly. Adds +16 cargo slots.

mining_heavy.name: Class-II Carbide Core Drill
mining_heavy.desc: Tier 2 heavy driller. Necessary for extracting volatile Ignis mineral nodes safely.

mining_plasma.name: Class-III Plasma Inductor Matrix
mining_plasma.desc: Tier 3 advanced plasma extraction beam. Greatly increases extraction yields.

mining_plasma2.name: Class-IV Plasma Ripper
mining_plasma2.desc: Tier 4 advanced plasma extraction beam. Greatly increases extraction yields.

mining_gas.name: Class-G Atmospheric Gas Siphon
mining_gas.desc: A specialized electromagnetic condenser component. Required for harvesting precious gaseous planetary clouds and nebulae. Purchased from mining stations only.

heat_core.name: Thermal Ejection Core
heat_core.desc: Emergency thermal venting core. Ejects on use to reset heat to 0 and provides 60s of total heat immunity. Requires station replacement.
